negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg

1. ailton_silva = ailton [input(axiom)]
2. brazilian(ailton_silva) [input(axiom)]
3. plays_for(ailton_silva,nautico) [input(axiom)]
10. ? [X0] : (plays_for(X0,nautico) & brazilian(X0)) [input(conjecture)]
11. ~? [X0] : (plays_for(X0,nautico) & brazilian(X0)) [negated conjecture 10]
17. ! [X0] : (~plays_for(X0,nautico) | ~brazilian(X0)) [ennf transformation 11]
18. ailton_silva = ailton [cnf transformation 1]
19. brazilian(ailton_silva) [cnf transformation 2]
20. plays_for(ailton_silva,nautico) [cnf transformation 3]
24. ~plays_for(X0,nautico) | ~brazilian(X0) [cnf transformation 17]
25. brazilian(ailton) [definition unfolding 19,18]
26. plays_for(ailton,nautico) [definition unfolding 20,18]
27. ~brazilian(ailton) [resolution 26,24]
28. $false [forward subsumption resolution 27,25]
% SZS output end Proof for neg
